title: Anthropic research based on ~310K anonymized Claude conversations shows how Claude's expressed values and behaviors vary across models and languages (Jason Nelson/Decrypt)
summary:
Jason Nelson / Decrypt:
Anthropic research based on ~310K anonymized Claude conversations shows how Claude's expressed values and behaviors vary across models and languages  —  Claude doesn't behave the same way in every conversation.  According to new research published Monday, AI giant Anthropic found …

title: Singapore-based and Alibaba-backed video generation startup PixVerse says it closed a Series C extension to raise $439M total for the round, valuing it at $2B+ (Ivan Mehta/TechCrunch)
summary:
Ivan Mehta / TechCrunch:
Singapore-based and Alibaba-backed video generation startup PixVerse says it closed a Series C extension to raise $439M total for the round, valuing it at $2B+  —  Singapore-based video generation startup PixVerse said today that it has closed its Series C extension, with a total of $439 million raised in the round.
